title: Reset MFA
text: To reset multi-factor authentication, go to Security Settings and choose Reset MFA.

title: VPN Setup
text: Install the company VPN client, sign in with SSO, and verify device trust.

title: Expense Policy
text: Meals under the travel policy can be reimbursed when receipts are attached.

title: Password Rotation
text: Passwords for internal tools should be rotated every 90 days.

title: Laptop Replacement
text: Employees can request a laptop replacement through the IT service portal.

title: Incident Escalation
text: Critical production incidents should be escalated to the on-call engineer immediately.
